'''ân-y-v''' ('''nayava''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:flexure|flexure]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-y-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:flexure|flexure]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-y-v
|-
! Lemma
| nayava
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nayavithi|nayavithi]] || [[word:nayaviji|nayaviji]] || [[word:nayavishi|nayavishi]] || [[word:nayavi|nayavi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nayavuthuth|nayavuthuth]] || [[word:nayavujuj|nayavujuj]] || [[word:nayavushush|nayavushush]] || [[word:nayav|nayav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nayavuthu|nayavuthu]] || [[word:nayavuju|nayavuju]] || [[word:nayavushu|nayavushu]] || [[word:nayavu|nayavu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nayavufuth|nayavufuth]] || [[word:nayavufuj|nayavufuj]] || [[word:nayavufush|nayavufush]] || [[word:nayavuf|nayavuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nayavethe|nayavethe]] || [[word:nayaveje|nayaveje]] || [[word:nayaveshe|nayaveshe]] || [[word:nayave|nayave]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nayavothoth|nayavothoth]] || [[word:nayavojoj|nayavojoj]] || [[word:nayavoshosh|nayavoshosh]] || [[word:nayav|nayav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nayavotho|nayavotho]] || [[word:nayavojo|nayavojo]] || [[word:nayavosho|nayavosho]] || [[word:nayavo|nayavo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nayavofoth|nayavofoth]] || [[word:nayavofoj|nayavofoj]] || [[word:nayavofosh|nayavofosh]] || [[word:nayavof|nayavof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nayavĂŠthĂŠ|nayavĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:nayavĂŠjĂŠ|nayavĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:nayavĂŠshĂŠ|nayavĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:nayavĂŠ|nayavĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nayavathath|nayavathath]] || [[word:nayavajaj|nayavajaj]] || [[word:nayavashash|nayavashash]] || [[word:nayav|nayav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nayavatha|nayavatha]] || [[word:nayavaja|nayavaja]] || [[word:nayavasha|nayavasha]] || [[word:nayava|nayava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nayavafath|nayavafath]] || [[word:nayavafaj|nayavafaj]] || [[word:nayavafash|nayavafash]] || [[word:nayavaf|nayavaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:nayavasha|nayavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gonayavasha|gonayavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokinayavasha|gokinayavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:nayavnĂŒsha|nayavnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gonayavnknĂŒsha|gonayavnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokinayavnĂŒsha|gokinayavnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nayavshĂ«sha|nayavshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonayavnkshĂ«sha|gonayavnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinayavshĂ«sha|gokinayavshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nayavrosha|nayavrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonayavnkrosha|gonayavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinayavrosha|gokinayavrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nayavmusha|nayavmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gonayavnkmusha|gonayavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinayavmusha|gokinayavmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:nayavsherasha|nayavsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gonayavnksherasha|gonayavnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokinayavsherasha|gokinayavsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:nayavngasha|nayavngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gonayavnkngasha|gonayavnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokinayavngasha|gokinayavngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nayavyasha|nayavyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gonayavnkyasha|gonayavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokinayavyasha|gokinayavyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:nayavyamasha|nayavyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gonayavnkyamasha|gonayavnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokinayavyamasha|gokinayavyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:nayavnĂŒshĂ«sha|nayavnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonayavnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gonayavnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinayavnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokinayavnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nayavnĂŒrosha|nayavnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonayavnknĂŒrosha|gonayavnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinayavnĂŒrosha|gokinayavnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nayavnĂŒmusha|nayavnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonayavnknĂŒmusha|gonayavnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinayavnĂŒmusha|gokinayavnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:nayavshĂ«nĂŒsha|nayavshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonayavnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gonayavnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinayavshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokinayavshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nayavshĂ«rosha|nayavshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonayavnkshĂ«rosha|gonayavnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinayavshĂ«rosha|gokinayavshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nayavshĂ«musha|nayavshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonayavnkshĂ«musha|gonayavnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinayavshĂ«musha|gokinayavshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:nayavronĂŒsha|nayavronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonayavnkronĂŒsha|gonayavnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinayavronĂŒsha|gokinayavronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:nayavroshĂ«sha|nayavroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonayavnkroshĂ«sha|gonayavnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinayavroshĂ«sha|gokinayavroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nayavromusha|nayavromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonayavnkromusha|gonayavnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinayavromusha|gokinayavromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:nayavmunĂŒsha|nayavmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonayavnkmunĂŒsha|gonayavnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinayavmunĂŒsha|gokinayavmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:nayavmushĂ«sha|nayavmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonayavnkmushĂ«sha|gonayavnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinayavmushĂ«sha|gokinayavmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nayavmurosha|nayavmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonayavnkmurosha|gonayavnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinayavmurosha|gokinayavmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:nayav|nayav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŠyĂŠv|nĂŠyĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:honayav|honayav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:honĂŠyĂŠv|honĂŠyĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohonayav|hohonayav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohonĂŠyĂŠv|hohonĂŠyĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒnayav|nĂŒnayav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŠyĂŠv|nĂŒnĂŠyĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒnayav|nĂŒnĂŒnayav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒnĂŠyĂŠv|nĂŒnĂŒnĂŠyĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻnayav|nĂŻnayav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŠyĂŠv|nĂŻnĂŠyĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻnayav|nĂŻnĂŻnayav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻnĂŠyĂŠv|nĂŻnĂŻnĂŠyĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lunayav|lunayav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lunĂŠyĂŠv|lunĂŠyĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulunayav|lulunayav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulunĂŠyĂŠv|lulunĂŠyĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:linayav|linayav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:linĂŠyĂŠv|linĂŠyĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilinayav|lilinayav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilinĂŠyĂŠv|lilinĂŠyĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:konayav|konayav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:konĂŠyĂŠv|konĂŠyĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokonayav|kokonayav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokonĂŠyĂŠv|kokonĂŠyĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kenayav|kenayav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kenĂŠyĂŠv|kenĂŠyĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekenayav|kekenayav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekenĂŠyĂŠv|kekenĂŠyĂŠv]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
